page_hero.title: About On Capacitor
page_hero.subtitle: Precision engineering. Trusted by industry. Driven by innovation.

items.title: Precision First
items.body: Every specification matters. We engineer to tolerances that ensure consistent, predictable performance across the lifetime of each component.

items.title: Partnership Mindset
items.body: We build lasting relationships with our customers, acting as a technical partner rather than just a supplier — from design to delivery and beyond.

items.title: Global Reach
items.body: With customers in over 40 countries, we understand the demands of international supply chains and deliver with the reliability global operations require.

team.title: Meet the People Behind On Capacitor
team.lead: A small, focused team of engineers and specialists dedicated to precision and quality.

cta.title: Want to work with us?
cta.body: Whether you need a standard product or a fully custom solution, our team is ready to help.
